title: Carbon & Red
note: Premium 3D Carbon & Red icon library. Each .svg embeds a 128x128 PNG as base64 <image>. 'card' = carbon-fibre tile + red bezel + glyph; 'glyph' = best-effort transparent glyph extracted from the same tile crop. Raster-in-SVG, not vector redraw.
